subcodes.first_line: A brief account by this servant concerning the ascension of the Most Great Luminary through the oppression of the ungodly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مختصری از تفصیل این عبد آنکه بعد از ارتقای روح نیّر اعظم از ظلم مشرکین
